sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n65085" key="martu/rhsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μαρτῠ´ρ-ησις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n65085.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">corroborative evidence</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἡ ἀπὸ τῶν φαινομένων μ.</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:1:41" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.41</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
